title: Phase 3: Implement app icon and splash screen

designBrief.avoid: random styles, too many accents, cluttered dashboards, overused shadows/gradients, inconsistent corner radii, template look, breaking flows
designBrief.communicate: clarity, control, confidence, simplicity, financial awareness, reduced stress
designBrief.feel: trustworthy, modern, clean, pleasant, slightly premium, calm, efficient, visually memorable, finance/productivity

designSystem.summary: Implemented Deep Trust Blue design system: Color.kt rewritten with full M3 palette, Type.kt with refined scale + amount styles, Dimensions.kt with spacing/radius/elevation tokens, Theme.kt with FinanceColors CompositionLocal, XML resources for splash/dark mode.
